title: cristaria glaucophylla var. eriantha
intro: Cristaria glaucophylla var. eriantha, also known as the Golden Lotus or Golden Water Lily, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Nymphaeaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cristaria glaucophylla var. eriantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
